title: lepidium australe
intro: Lepidium australe, also known as Australian pepper grass or pepper grass, is a flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of glucosinolates and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lepidium australe include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory health, and protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Lepidium australe can be prepared for herbal use through teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
